visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a medium close-up of a young woman with hair clips smiling at the camera. She stands in a brightly lit indoor space with white walls and wooden shelves behind her. She then presents a large white plastic bin overflowing with dozens of various makeup containers, including tubes, brushes, and compacts, demonstrating her extensive collection. (2) The woman presents specific base products. She holds up a purple tube from I'M MEME and then a beige tube from Celleryoung. She applies a small amount of the purple cream to the back of her hand, rubbing it in to show a distinct brightening effect. The background features a clean domestic setting with a wooden shelf holding a clock and various small decorative objects. (3) The creator demonstrates eye and face products. She uses a brown CANMAKE eyeliner pencil, drawing smooth lines on her hand and then applying it to her eyelid. A transition shows a row of many colored eyeliner boxes. She then opens a three-color concealer palette from THE SAME and applies a dab to her chin area before showing a dual-ended I'M MEME contour stick. (4) The final phase shows lip and setting products. She demonstrates two shades of YOU'RE MINE lipstick, swatching them on her hand. She then holds up a pink FIXX setting spray bottle. After showing a collage of social media reviews, she uses a white tissue to wipe the spray nozzle and then closes her eyes while spraying a fine mist over her face. The video ends with her against a black background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 因為我很愛買 很愛試 我有這麼多的彩妝 但我最常用的是 這些. (2) [Slogan]: I'M MEME 校色妝前乳. [Variety]: 紫色：提亮暗沈蠟黃 綠色：修飾泛紅痘痘. (3) [Slogan]: Celleryoung 防曬潤色 EE 霜. (4) [Variety]: 先上校色再上潤色 or 粉底. (5) [Slogan]: CANMAKE 眼線膠筆. [Variety]: 酒紅色 09 號 有多滑順!!!. (6) [Slogan]: THE SAME 三色遮瑕膏 02 號. (7) [Slogan]: I'M MEME 雙頭修容打亮筆 01 號. [Variety]: 修容筆. (8) [Slogan]: CANMAKE 礦物控油蜜粉 (綠). [Variety]: 抑制出油 修飾泛紅 定妝持久. (9) [Slogan]: YOU'RE MINE 我的天哪滋潤唇膏. [Variety]: 01 號 08 號. (10) [Slogan]: FIXX 定妝噴霧. [Variety]: 大推!! 超多分享跟推薦 ! 筆記起來 !. (11) [Variety]: 筆記起來了嗎.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator speaking directly to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young Asian female with black hair styled with small colorful clips, wearing a black and white patterned sleeveless top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, well-lit room with wooden shelves containing a clock, small figurines, and numerous makeup bins.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice introduces the video over an upbeat, moderate-tempo electronic pop track. The voice displays high pitch variability and a friendly tone. As she gestures toward her makeup collection, the faint rustling sound of plastic bins and containers shifting is clearly audible. (2) When the narrator opens a plastic makeup tube, a distinct 'pop' or suction sound is heard. This is followed by a soft, creamy sliding texture sound as she describes the application of the cream to her hand. The background music maintains a consistent, steady percussive beat. (3) A sharp mechanical click sound is triggered as the creator opens a brand-name eyeliner pencil. This is followed by a subtle scratching or friction sound of the pencil tip moving across the skin surface. The narrator's speech density remains high, explaining the product's glide quality. (4) The sound of a lipstick case clicking open and then snapping shut is audible during the lip product demonstration. This is immediately followed by a prominent, sharp hissing sound from an aerosol setting spray bottle. A paper rustling sound follows as a tissue is used to clean the nozzle.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Base Makeup -> Eyes/Face -> Lips/Setting -> Practical Tip -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: A high-energy makeup haul and recommendation video where the creator shares her daily go-to cosmetic products across various categories, providing application techniques and brand names to guide viewers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of multiple brand names, logos, and specific product model numbers paired with verbal recommendations and hands-on demonstrations.

high_inference.freeDescribe: This is a social-media-native beauty recommendation video with fast cuts, high-density text overlays, and a very energetic vocal performance.
